steps.title: Match the claim
steps.content: The claim is specifically about how restorative sleep can be for young people. The best quotation therefore needs to mention sleep or slumber and show that it refreshes, comforts, or renews children. A quotation about home, storytelling, or injustice would not illustrate that claim.

steps.title: Eliminate unrelated quotes
steps.content: Choice A discusses the simple story of Elleanor and says nothing about sleep. Choice B describes the sacred character of home, not rest. Choice D addresses wrongs that cannot be undone, so it is unrelated to sleep or restoration.

steps.title: Use the restorative quote
steps.content: The remaining quotation says the slumbers of the innocent are blessed and that they refresh and gladden the spirit of childhood, directly supporting the claim about restorative sleep for young people. The answer is C.
